message:
fix: remove stale SHM after WAL checkpoint and fix misleading comment

- After successful PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE), also remove the SHM
  file — a stale SHM can confuse FrankenSQLite on next open.
- Fixed comment that said "PASSIVE checkpoint" but code uses TRUNCATE.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
